results.title: Ship To - View Saved Addresses
results.notes: Address list displays 2 addresses (Jane Doe + mila mila) with all fields. Edit/Delete actions visible per row via gear icon. CAVEAT: NO 'Default' badge concept rendered in storefront UI (assertion partially N/A — see BUG-010-001). NO search/filter controls on management page (advanced search/facets exist only in checkout per PR #129). Console clean.

results.title: Ship To - Add New Address
results.notes: New address modal has all required fields. State dropdown populates after Country. Address saved successfully and appears in list. CAVEAT: NO 'Set as default' checkbox on form (related to BUG-010-001). No success toast captured but list refreshes with new entry. Console clean.

results.title: Ship To - Edit Address
results.notes: Edit form pre-fills all values. Modified street '456 New St Apt 2B' and phone saved successfully. Console clean.

results.title: Ship To - Delete Address
results.notes: Delete confirmation modal 'Delete address - Are you sure...' with CANCEL/OK. Address removed after OK. Console clean.

results.title: Ship To - Set Default Address
results.notes: BUG-010-001: No 'Set as Default' action in row Actions menu. Only Edit/Delete options. No 'Default' badge on any address. GraphQL response confirms isDefault=false for ALL addresses. UI gap — feature not exposed for personal accounts.

results.title: Ship To - Select Address in Checkout
results.notes: Checkout address selector modal opens from /cart with PR #129 advanced controls: Country/State/City facets + Search input + ADD NEW button. Both addresses listed. Selecting updates shipping AND billing in cart summary. CAVEAT: default address NOT pre-selected (related to BUG-010-001). Console clean.

results.title: Ship To - Header Selector/Dropdown
results.notes: Header 'Ship to:' selector visible. Dropdown opens showing all addresses + 'Add new' button. Selection updates header text immediately. CAVEAT: initial state shows 'Select address' (related to BUG-010-001). Pricing/availability switch behavior not deeply verified in this run.

results.title: Ship To - Add Address During Checkout
results.notes: ADD NEW button visible in checkout address selector modal (verified via SHIP-006 screenshot). Full e2e add-via-checkout flow not exhaustively re-tested in this session.

results.title: Ship To - Address Validation
results.notes: BUG-010-002: Form ACCEPTS invalid ZIP '999' and invalid phone '123'. CREATE button enables and address saves. NO inline format validation. Only required-field error for empty State.

results.title: Ship To - Mobile Address Management
results.notes: Mobile 375x667 layout: address cards stack vertically, all fields wrap, gear icon visible, ADD NEW button visible, no horizontal scroll. Touch-friendly.

results.title: Ship To - International Address Support
results.notes: Province dropdown updates from US states to Canadian provinces (Ontario, Quebec, Alberta, etc.) when Country switched to Canada. 13 Canadian provinces shown, no US states. Postal code field accepts variable-format input.

results.title: Ship To - Address Nickname
results.notes: No nickname/alias field exists in address form. Form fields: First/Last name, Email, Phone, Country, ZIP, State, City, Address, Apt. Feature not implemented.

results.title: Ship To - XSS Prevention in Address Form
results.notes: Server REJECTS XSS payloads (script/img/svg) via updateMemberAddresses mutation returning errors[] with VALIDATION code. No

results.title: Ship To - Server Silently Skips Duplicate Address on Save
results.notes: BUG-010-003: Server INSERTED duplicate (totalCount 2 → 3) when adding an address with same line1/line2/city/regionId/postalCode/countryCode but different first/last/email. Per PROPOSED-BL-PROFILE-001, server should silently skip. Two identical-location records now coexist.

results.title: Quick Order by SKU
results.notes: /bulk-order page loads with TWO modes: 'Copy&Paste' (CSV-style textarea) + 'Manually' (per-row SKU+Qty). Multiple rows pre-rendered. CAVEAT: No live product info preview after SKU entry — assertion '[DOM] Valid SKU entry loads product: name, price, availability' NOT met. SKU is validated only on add-to-cart, not before. No auto-focus on first SKU field.

results.title: Add All to Cart
results.notes: Single SKU added via Manually mode triggers 'ADD TO CART' button which transitions to /cart with the items added. Coalesces with existing cart lines for the same SKU.

results.title: Invalid SKU Handling
results.notes: After click ADD TO CART with valid + invalid SKU, an 'Add to cart SKU errors' modal opens listing 'FAKE-SKU-99999 - Invalid product' with CLOSE button. Valid SKU was added successfully (error scoped to invalid row only).

results.title: Multi-row Entry
results.notes: Form accepts 5+ rows. '+ Add 5 more rows' link allows extending. Pre-rendered with 5 rows by default. No state loss observed during multi-row entry.

results.title: Paste from Spreadsheet
results.notes: Copy&Paste mode accepts CSV-style paste with comma-separated SKU,Quantity (one row per line). UI hint: 'SKU,Quantity. Each record should start with a new line'. Format example shown ('6AF8SM0VPFV6,10'). ADD TO CART processes the pasted data. NOTE: Test description mentioned tab-separated; actual UI accepts comma-separated.

results.title: Bulk Order Quantity Validation
results.notes: Quantity 0 → ADD TO CART button DISABLED. Negative quantity (-1) → input value cleared, button DISABLED. Quantity 1 → button ENABLED. Validation works at form level.

results.title: Duplicate SKU Across Rows Coalesces Into Single Cart Line
results.notes: BL-CART-007 PASS: 3 rows of same SKU coalesced into ONE cart line with summed quantity (9). Single line, not three. Cart subtotal correct for one line. CAVEAT/SEPARATE BUG-010-004: Line ended at qty 9 which EXCEEDS product max-qty cap of 7 ('You can order from 1 to 7 item(s)' warning shown AFTER push). Cap not enforced server-side in addBulkItemsCart.

results.title: Dashboard Page Loads
results.notes: /account/dashboard loads. Sections render: LATEST ORDERS, MONTHLY SPEND REPORT (51% donut chart), ORDERS STATUS. No JS errors, no 4xx/5xx. Clean.

results.title: Recent Orders Widget
results.notes: User Mila has zero orders → widget shows 'There are no orders yet' empty state with CONTINUE BROWSING CTA. Cannot assert 5 most-recent orders fields with this account. Empty state correctly displayed (matches DASH-005 expectations).

results.title: Monthly Spend Display
results.notes: Monthly Spend Report widget visible: 51% donut chart, Budget $58,152, Totally spent $530,152. CAVEAT: Numbers appear to be account-aggregate / mocked (not strictly current month) — value-source not deeply audited. Currency formatting correct.

results.title: Quick Navigation Links
results.notes: All sidebar links have correct hrefs: Orders→/account/orders, Lists→/account/lists, Profile→/account/profile, Addresses→/account/addresses. Spot-checked /account/orders navigation - returns 200 OK.

results.title: Dashboard After First Login
results.notes: Mila account effectively in empty state (no orders). Dashboard renders empty-state messages without errors. CONTINUE BROWSING CTA shown. No widget errors due to missing data.

results.title: Recent Orders Widget - Last 5 with Correct Data
results.notes: User has 0 orders, empty state shown. Cannot validate 5-row layout / sort with this account.

results.title: Dashboard - Spend Display Accuracy
results.notes: Spend amount displayed with $ formatting. Currency correct. Same caveat as DASH-003 — period semantics not deeply audited.

results.title: Dashboard - Quick Navigation Links Functional
results.notes: Same as DASH-004 — Orders/Lists/Addresses links navigate correctly. Spot-checked /account/orders, returns 200 OK.

results.title: Notification Bell Icon
results.notes: Notification bell visible in nav header with badge count '4' (numeric > 0). Format correct. Tap target adequate.

results.title: Notification Dropdown Opens
results.notes: Click bell → dropdown opens showing 'Notifications (4)' header, 'Show unread only' toggle, 4 notifications with title/timestamp, unread blue-dot indicator, 'Clear all' + 'View all notifications' buttons.

results.title: Mark as Read
results.notes: Click on unread notification → blue dot disappears, badge decrements 4→3.

results.title: Empty Notifications
results.notes: After 'Mark all as read', badge disappears (just 'Notifications' label, no count). Notifications still listed but all marked read. Strict 'no notifications' empty state would require deletion (not currently exposed).

results.title: Empty Notifications State
results.notes: Same as NOTIF-004. After mark-all-as-read the badge is gone but list is preserved. 'Show unread only' toggle would render empty if there are no unreads.

results.title: Subscribe to Back-in-Stock Alert
results.notes: No out-of-stock product readily identified during this run. Would require seeding an OOS product to test. Skipped.

results.title: Back-in-Stock Subscription Indicator
results.notes: Skipped (no existing subscription on this account).

results.title: Notification Bell Badge - Unread Count
results.notes: Same evidence as NOTIF-001. Badge count = 4 (valid positive integer). No GraphQL errors on page load.

results.title: Notification Dropdown - View Recent
results.notes: Same evidence as NOTIF-002. Dropdown lists recent notifications with title/message and date/time. Unread vs read visually distinguished by blue dot.

results.title: Mark Individual Notification as Read
results.notes: Same as NOTIF-003. Click on unread → visual style changes (no blue dot), badge decrements by 1, mutation returns 200 with empty errors[].

results.title: Mark All Notifications as Read
results.notes: Three-dot menu reveals 'Mark all as read' / 'Mark all as unread' / 'Clear all' actions. Click 'Mark all as read' → all notifications lose unread style, badge disappears completely. State persists.

results.title: Back-in-Stock Page
results.notes: /account/back-in-stock loads. Heading 'BACK-IN-STOCK LIST' present. Empty state 'Your list is empty' + CONTINUE BROWSING CTA. No JS errors.

results.title: Subscribe to Alert
results.notes: Skipped — no readily-available OOS product identified during this run.

results.title: Unsubscribe from Alert
results.notes: Skipped — no existing subscription to unsubscribe from.

results.title: Points History Page
results.notes: /account/points-history loads. Heading 'POINTS HISTORY' present. 'Balance: 0' displayed. Transaction table headers Operation/Type/Date/Amount visible. Empty list since Mila has no transactions.

results.title: Points After Order
results.notes: Mila has no order history; cannot validate points crediting after order with this account in this run.

results.title: Loyalty Points Balance Display
results.notes: Loyalty section visible at /account/points-history. Balance = 0 displayed as numeric value. Format consistent.

results.title: Loyalty Points Transaction History
results.notes: No transactions for this account. Table headers visible. Cannot validate earn/redeem rendering.

results.title: Loyalty Points Earning After Purchase
results.notes: Cannot test live — no completed orders for this account.

results.title: Bulk Order Page - Accessible from Navigation
results.notes: 'Bulk order' link visible in main navigation header → /bulk-order. Page loads with SKU input form (Copy&Paste + Manually modes).

results.title: Bulk Order - CSV File Upload
results.notes: No file upload UI on /bulk-order. Only inline Copy&Paste and Manually modes available. CSV file upload feature not implemented (or not exposed in personal account context).

results.title: Quick Order - SKU Autocomplete Suggestions
results.notes: No autocomplete dropdown appears when typing partial SKU. SKU field is plain text input; suggestions feature not implemented.

results.title: Quick Order - Non-Existent SKU Clear Error
results.notes: Validated via BULK-003 flow. 'Add to cart SKU errors' modal lists 'FAKE-SKU-99999 - Invalid product' with CLOSE button. Clear, user-friendly error message.

results.title: Quick Order - Clear Form Resets All Entries
results.notes: RESET button clears all SKU and quantity entries. Form returns to initial empty state.

cleanup.cart_state: non-empty (existing test items + over-cap cocacola — would benefit from cart cleanup if next run requires fresh state)
cleanup.notes: Logged in as personal account (milamuller2024@yahoo.com). Personal account addresses returned to original 2-address baseline (Jane Doe, mila mila). All AGENT-TEST-* prefixed addresses deleted.

notes: Suite 010 covers 4 main domains: Ship-to/Address (14 cases), Bulk Order (10 cases), Dashboard (8 cases), Notifications/Stock/Loyalty (20 cases). Tested with personal account because /account/addresses is personal-only per memory; org users (default USER_EMAIL) lack the page. Found 4 distinct bugs: missing default-address UI, missing input format validation, missing duplicate-skip dedupe, and bulk-order quantity-cap bypass. 11 cases marked N/A due to either missing test data (OOS product, prior orders, points history) or features not implemented (nickname field, CSV upload, SKU autocomplete).
